title: kAuth
body:
🔐 **kAuth**
kAuth is a lightweight yet powerful plugin that adds a complete authorization and login system for your Minecraft server!

⚙️ **CONFIGURABLE**
Easily edit all messages, server names, and database settings - full customization to fit your needs.

🚫 **BLOCKED COMMANDS**
All commands are blocked on the auth-server (except those from the auth system).
This ensures secure login and prevents bypassing.

⚠️ **LIMIT ADDRESS**
Limit accounts per player ip

💾 **DATABASE**
All player accounts are saved in the database, and passwords are securely hashed for maximum safety.

🧩 **AUTH SERVER SYSTEM**
All commands and interactions are blocked on the auth-server until a player is logged in.

⚠️ You must use a dedicated auth/limbo server, not the lobby!

Auth Server: Players join here first and use /login or /register. Premium players log in automatically.

Lobby Server: Players are transferred here after successful login.

**Features**

✅ Premium & non-premium account support

✅ Lightweight and high-performance

✅ Secure password storage in database (hashed)

✅ Fully configurable

✅ Works with Minecraft 1.8+

[bStats](https://bstats.org/plugin/velocity/Auth/27130)
[Issues](https://github.com/kowadl0/auth/issues)

You can check the plugin on the mooneu.pl server
